question_text: Name one everyday appliance that uses electrical power and state whether it is high power or low power.
correct_answer: Examples: microwave (high power), LED light bulb (low power), electric kettle (high power), watch (low power), heater (high power), calculator (low power). Accept any reasonable example with correct classification.
explanation: High-power appliances transfer lots of energy quickly and get hot or do heavy-duty work (like kettles, microwaves, heaters). Low-power appliances use less energy and might be small or do light tasks (like LED bulbs, watches, calculators).
